case_title: 8500 VILLAGE, LTD. ET AL VS. HEALTHMEDICA INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF 8500 VILLAGE, LTD. PARTNERS INVESTORS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HEALTHMEDICA INC. UNIFUND INC. SASSOVER, NATHAN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT NATHAN SASSOVER ON SEP-13-2018 - OFF CALENDAR AT THE REQUEST OF MARC S. WILLIAMS, ESQ., COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF 8500 VILLAGE, LTD., ET AL., ON 9/12/18. UNABLE TO EFFECTUATE SERVICE OF THE OEX ON DEFENDANT/DEBTOR NATHAN SASSOVER. NO APPEARANCE. NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: ERIC R. FLEMING. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 8500 VILLAGE, LTD. PARTNERS INVESTORS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEALTHMEDICA INC. UNIFUND INC. SASSOVER, NATHAN $1,744,273.37 PRINCIPAL, $44,204.19 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,788,927.56, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF 8500 VILLAGE, LTD. PARTNERS INVESTORS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SASSOVER, NATHAN OEX HEARING SET FOR SEP-13-2018 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 514
